metadata.description: Dragon enemy type catalog with base stats and traits
metadata.usage: Provides base enemy types for pattern generation
notes: Base catalog of dragons with inherent stats and traits. Each item has individual properties. Type-level traits apply to all items in category.
Abilities use JSON Reference System v4.1 (@abilities/active/offensive:*)
Level-based ability unlocks provide enemy progression
Dragons have breath weapon abilities based on breathType trait
